title: Dark Brown Sugar Crumbled Garlic Argentinian
description: A savory and adventurous vegan dish featuring dark brown sugar, garlic, and flaky texture to satisfy your taste buds with a touch of Argentine flair.

ingredients.name: 50g dark brown sugar
ingredients.notes: Use vegan dark brown sugar if necessary

instructions: In a mixing bowl, mash the garlic cloves until smooth.
Add dark brown sugar, almond flour, nutritional yeast, and salt. Mix well until no lumps remain.
If using red pepper flakes, add them now and mix again.
Using your hands, crumble the mixture into small pieces to form a texture similar to that of shortbread cookies.
Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or silicone mat, leaving some space between each piece for even cooking.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy. The crumbles should be lightly toasted but not burnt.
Remove from oven once done and let cool slightly before serving.
